zh.lifeSummary: 當Ada van Brederode於1232年出生在荷蘭努-拉藍德布雷德盧德時，她的父親Dirk I van Brederode52歲，母親Aleidis van Heusden42歲。她於大約1250年與Willem II van Egmond在荷蘭努-拉藍德艾姆德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1297年1月20日在荷蘭努-拉藍德艾姆德享年65歲，埋葬在荷蘭努-拉藍德艾姆德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ada van Brederode于1232年出生在荷兰努-拉藍德布雷德盧德时，她的父亲Dirk I van Brederode52岁，母亲Aleidis van Heusden42岁。她于大约1250年与Willem II van Egmond在荷兰努-拉藍德艾姆德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1297年1月20日在荷兰努-拉藍德艾姆德享年65岁，埋葬在荷兰努-拉藍德艾姆德。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Ada
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of uncertain origin; it was not in general use before the late 18th century. It may be a Latinate variant of the biblical name Adah . However, it has also been explained as a pet form of Adele and Adelaide , Germanic female names of which the first element is adal ‘noble’. It was borne by a 7th-century abbess of Saint-Julien-des-Prés at Le Mans.

en.lifeSummary: When Ada van Brederode was born in 1232, in Brederode, North Holland, Netherlands, her father, Dirk I van Brederode, was 52 and her mother, Aleidis van Heusden, was 42. She married Willem II van Egmond about 1250, in Egmond, North Holland, Netherlands. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 20 January 1297, in Egmond, North Holland, Netherlands, at the age of 65, and was buried in Egmond, North Holland, Netherlands.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ada van Brederode est née en 1232, à Brederode, Hollande-septentrionale, Pays-Bas, son père, Dirk I van Brederode, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Aleidis van Heusden, avait 42 ans. Elle a épousé Willem II van Egmond environ 1250, à Egmond, Hollande-septentrionale, Pays-Bas. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 janvier 1297, à Egmond, Hollande-septentrionale, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Egmond, Hollande-septentrionale, Pays-Bas.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ada van Brederode 1232 in Brederode, Nord-Holland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Dirk I van Brederode 52 und ihre Mutter Aleidis van Heusden 42. Sie hat um 1250 in Egmond, Nord-Holland, Niederlande Willem II van Egmond geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. Januar 1297 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Egmond, Nord-Holland, Niederlande und wurde in Egmond, Nord-Holland, Niederlande begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ada van Brederode è nata il nel 1232 nel Brederode, Noord-Holland, Paesi Bassi, sua padre, Dirk I van Brederode, aveva 52 anni e sua madre, Aleidis van Heusden, aveva 42 anni. Lei sposato Willem II van Egmond circa 1250, nel Egmond, Noord-Holland, Paesi Bassi. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 20 gennaio 1297, nel Egmond, Noord-Holland, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolta a Egmond, Noord-Holland, Paesi Bassi.

ja.lifeSummary: Ada van Brederodeが1232年にオランダノオルド-hオランドブレデロドで生まれた時，父Dirk I van Brederodeは52歳，母Aleidis van Heusdenは42歳であった。約1250年にオランダノオルド-hオランドエグモンドでWillem II van Egmondと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1297年1月20日にオランダノオルド-hオランドエグモンドで65歳で死去し，オランダノオルド-hオランドエグモンドにて埋葬された。

ko.Egmond aan den Hoef, Bergen Municipality: 네덜란드 노르드-홀랜드 버겐 그몽 아아 든 호프
ko.Egmond aan den Hoef, Bergen, North Holla: 네덜란드 노르드-홀랜드 버겐 그몽 아아 든 호프
ko.lifeSummary: Ada van Brederode(이)가 1232년 네덜란드 노르드-홀랜드 브레더드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Dirk I van Brederode(은)는 52세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Aleidis van Heusden(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 대략 1250년 네덜란드 노르드-홀랜드 그몽에서 Willem II van Egmond(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1297년 1월 20일 네덜란드 노르드-홀랜드 그몽에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 네덜란드 노르드-홀랜드 그몽에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Willem II van Egmond aproximadamente 1250, em Egmond, Holanda do Norte, Países Baixos. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ada van Brederode родилась в 1232 г. в местности бредирод, нурд-холланд, Нидерланды, её отцу по имени Dirk I van Brederode было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Aleidis van Heusden, 42. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Willem II van Egmond около 1250 г. в местности эгмонд, нурд-холланд, Нидерланды. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 20 января 1297 г. в местности эгмонд, нурд-холланд, Нидерланды в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности эгмонд, нурд-холланд, Нидерланды.
